nasb.text: but the sons of the kingdom will be cast out into the outer darkness; in that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.”

esv.text: while the sons of the kingdom will be thrown into the outer darkness. In that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.”

cnv.text: 但本來要承受天國的人，反被丟在外面黑暗裡，在那裡必要哀哭切齒。”

ccb.text: 但那些本应承受天国的人反会被赶出去，在黑暗里哀哭切齿。”

csbs.text: 但那些‘天国的儿女’，却将被丢在外面的黑暗里。在那里将有哀哭和切齿。”
